is included or Download the HyVisual 2.2-beta-3 Installer for Windows (6.8 Mb .exe file) - the Jave Runtime Environment 1.4.1_01 is not included Installation Instructions Below are the more detailed installation instructions. 1. Install HyVisual Run

installation instructions. 1. Install HyVisual Run the installer as an applet . This applet, built with a commercial product from Zero G Inc., will install HyVisual, from Berkeley, on your machine. If you choose to install via the applet, a dialog wi

you choose to install via the applet, a dialog will pop up asking if you will grant permission to run software from Zero G Software. To continue with the installation process, click on the 'Grant' button. or Download the HyVisual 2.2-beta-3 Instal

button. or Download the HyVisual 2.2-beta-3 Installer for Windows (17.2 Mb .exe file) - the Jave Runtime Environment 1.4.1_01 is included or Download the HyVisual 2.2-beta-3 Installer for Windows (6.8 Mb .exe file) - the Jave Runtime Environment 1.4.

Mb .exe file) - the Jave Runtime Environment 1.4.1_01 is not included HyVisual requires Java 1.4 or later. Java 1.4.1_01 is preferred. If you do not have Java installed, or do not know which version of Java is installed, then choose the installer ab

of Java is installed, then choose the installer above that includes the Java Runtime Environment. This page covers installing HyVisual via a traditional Windows Installer Other formats include: Installing HyVisual via a standalone installer on platfo
